case_title: GARY VERKHOLAZ RESPONDENT VS. AZADEH BOUTIQUE APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL TRIAL DE NOVO ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE WAS INTRODUCED. MATTER WAS SUBMITTED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF GARY VERKHOLAZ AND AGAINST DEFENDANT AZADEH BOUTIQUE FOR $1300 AND $32.00 COSTS C. ROSACK CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED (525)
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED
